defects: Spelling/fidelity: Header: 'Luxury Boutique Manager — Dubai Mall' is missing; instead, the amount and field are displayed.
Spelling/fidelity: Country: 'UAE' expected, but rendered as 'UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'.
Spelling/fidelity: Position: 'Luxury retaii 8+ years – AED 14,000' appears instead of 'Boutique Manager (1) — AED 14,000', and 'retaii' is a misspelling of 'retail'.
Spelling/fidelity: Email: 'apply@ase.com' shown instead of 'jobs@alyousufent.com'.
Missing fact: Phone: 9324995767

Visual QA (catastrophic): Imagery-theme mismatch: industrial refinery photo for a fashion house/boutique manager role will confuse both clients and candidates—this is a critical misdirection violating candidate-first principles.
Visual QA (catastrophic): QR code and white panel poorly integrated, encroaching into key information space—breaking clean professional composition.

Visual QA (catastrophic): No credible candidate-facing hook for the actual advertised opportunity; billboard headline ($5,000/MONTH, RETAIL) draws in candidates irrelevant to boutique/fashion, then the role is buried in a subtext.
Visual QA (catastrophic): Key content (role, employer, benefits) is easily missed due to competing, irrelevant visual message.
Visual QA score 62/100 is below the 85 publishable bar
Visual QA: Imagery is highly incongruent: background is of an industrial oil/gas plant but the role is ‘Boutique Manager / Premium Fashion House’. This causes major candidate relevance confusion.
Visual QA: Headline references 'RETAIL' with an oil and gas visual, compounding confusion.
Visual QA: The hook ($5,000/MONTH | UNITED ARAB EMIRATES • RETAIL) is visually clear but misleading to the role imagery/context.
Visual QA: Benefit text ('Commission', 'Brand allowance') poorly spaced, and the QR code overlaps the content.
Visual QA: Email/contact CTA is present but not sufficiently bold or dominant relative to the salary headline.
